h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.recoheredEarlier: I thought the exact line would do the caption’s work because the words are identical both times.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it, or I think I do
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was proceeding on the assumption that identical words perform the same semantic work regardless of the speaker's position.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: The pencil has found the pressure points, but underlining now stops settling the verb. It shows where the badge may have changed hands; it does not yet show whether the label will make that change public.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor abandons the underlining task and introduces a new 'print test' mechanism to evaluate the caption's public effect.
scored.tutorAdaptationEvidence: “Turned back” is worth testing, not dropping. Put a pencil under three bits of evidence in the second excerpt: who has the floor, who the line is aimed at now, and what the room does after it.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: The tutor directly adopts the learner's proposed verb and designs a specific evidence-gathering task to test its validity.
